assessment.note: Uncertainty about next-quarter ownership is a strong clarity gap that is stalling mentoring momentum and creating unease.

new_queue.label: Next quarter ownership
new_queue.name: What feels most unclear about what you'll own next quarter?
new_queue.description: Drills into the ownership uncertainty she named to locate the specific clarity gap blocking momentum.

new_queue.label: Support ask
new_queue.name: What do you need from me to keep the next two weeks moving cleanly?
new_queue.description: Identifies the specific support or decision she needs from her manager to stay unblocked.

new_queue.label: Close the loop
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, what’s the first thing you want to tighten up before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Ends on a concrete next step without opening a new thread.
